name: Rand Paul
subject: media blackout
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

In less than two weeks, I'll be taking to the Republican debate stage in Boulder, Colorado for the third showdown with my shrinking field of opponents for the GOP nomination for President.

The national media -- desperate to push party establishment picks and turn this campaign into a TV reality show -- wants nothing more than to blackout my message of liberty and limited government.

So my campaign is preparing to launch a massive TV and Radio Ad Blitz to flood Iowa airwaves during and after this critical debate.

**[Will you please chip in $20.16 or more immediately to help make this a reality](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31037539:WtchpSm7N:m:1:879035888:B90DF2DEF49E4FEE0ECA694BF9F268A4:r)**?

My staff has run the numbers, and we need to raise $200,000 by Tuesday, October 20th at midnight to make this work.

With your support, we can bust through the media blackout and send shockwaves through the media and the national political establishment.

For the first time in decades, you and I have a true chance to nominate a Republican who will take a sledgehammer to the Washington Machine.

If elected, that's exactly what I'll do.

My plan to institute a 14.5% flat tax, and return $2 TRILLION to the American people, isn't just designed to get our economy moving and create jobs. It's designed to blow up our current tax code and force government to live within its means.

My plan to impose term limits in Washington, D.C. isn't just designed to change a few faces in Congress. It's designed to clean house of Big Government career politicians.

My plan to force Congress to read the bills they pass isn't just designed to force members of Congress to stop passing thousand-page bills at the last minute, it's designed to END lobbyists' grip on Washington, D.C.

If elected, I will fully REPEAL ObamaCare, end domestic government spying and finally audit and expose the damage the U.S. Federal Reserve has wreaked on our country.

Not one of my opponents can make any of these promises.

In fact, they wouldn't even dare.

While they may toss some red meat out every once in awhile to try and fool primary voters, _they think everything is "A-OK" with Big Government_.

But the truth is, our nation is over $18 TRILLION in debt and spending is STILL increasing!

Politicians in BOTH parties have almost succeeded in wiping the Fourth and Tenth Amendments off the books.

Now, they're coming for the First Amendment's protection of religious liberty and our Second Amendment's right to keep and bear arms.

Even after the release of videos showing Planned Parenthood officials admitting they routinely abort unborn babies, dismember them and then sell their body parts for profit, _our elected officials will hardly lift a finger to defund them_!

Everything is not "A-OK."

And with the stakes for our country higher than ever, we can't afford another Republican nominee who will betray us.

We desperately need a President who will completely pull the plug on the Washington Machine and start over.

Whether it's forcing the Obama administration to back down on the use of drones targeting U.S. citizens on American soil, President Obama's attempt to rush to ISIS' aid in Syria, or forcing the worst of the so-called "PATRIOT" Act's provisions to expire, _I have proven I will stand up to anyone in either party to uphold my oath of office_.

But Fellow Conservative, you do have a choice.

You can choose to return to the constitutional principles that have made America great.

You can choose a candidate who can not only DEFEAT Hillary Clinton, but is committed to restoring the principles of liberty you and I hold so dear.

**[So please help me by chipping in your most generous contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31037539:WtchpSm7N:m:1:879035888:B90DF2DEF49E4FEE0ECA694BF9F268A4:r)**.

We only have until Tuesday, October 20th to hit our $200,000 goal. This is the most critical moment of my campaign to date. So every dollar counts.

I'm confident this TV and Radio Ad Blitz in Iowa is just what we need to break the media's stranglehold on my campaign.

But this plan can only be successful with your help.

With my deadline rapidly approaching, **[will you please chip in a contribution IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31037539:WtchpSm7N:m:1:879035888:B90DF2DEF49E4FEE0ECA694BF9F268A4:r)**?

Will you help me bust through the media blackout?

Thank you in advance for your generous and continued support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31037540:WtchpSm7N:m:1:879035888:B90DF2DEF49E4FEE0ECA694BF9F268A4:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31037541:WtchpSm7N:m:1:879035888:B90DF2DEF49E4FEE0ECA694BF9F268A4:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31037542:WtchpSm7N:m:1:879035888:B90DF2DEF49E4FEE0ECA694BF9F268A4:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31037543:WtchpSm7N:m:1:879035888:B90DF2DEF49E4FEE0ECA694BF9F268A4:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31037539:WtchpSm7N:m:1:879035888:B90DF2DEF49E4FEE0ECA694BF9F268A4:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31037539:WtchpSm7N:m:1:879035888:B90DF2DEF49E4FEE0ECA694BF9F268A4:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31037544:WtchpSm7N:m:1:879035888:B90DF2DEF49E4FEE0ECA694BF9F268A4:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31037545:WtchpSm7N:m:1:879035888:B90DF2DEF49E4FEE0ECA694BF9F268A4:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31037546:WtchpSm7N:m:1:879035888:B90DF2DEF49E4FEE0ECA694BF9F268A4:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: Results. Now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, yesterday John Kasich unveiled his plan to balance America's budget, return money, power and influence back to Americans, and create jobs.

Every single American has a more than $57,000 share of our runaway national debt and it's a crushing burden that we can't afford to lay on future generations. Gov. Kasich is the only candidate with a plan to balance the budget.

**[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31044281:WGANlSmnN:m:1:958431888:98BD7E55F93BE104735A8F28DDE317E8:r)
The Kasich Action Plan:**
[JohnKasich.com/ResultsNow](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31044282:WGANlSmnN:m:1:958431888:98BD7E55F93BE104735A8F28DDE317E8:r)

**In his first 100 days as President, John Kasich will begin to implement a comprehensive plan that creates a climate for job creation and fiscal sanity**.

**Highlights of Kasich 's plan include:**

• Balancing the budget in eight years
• Cutting taxes for families and businesses
• Reining in burdensome federal regulations
• Increasing domestic energy production
• Returning major federal responsibilities back to our states and communities where they can be carried out more efficiently and responsively

_" Let me be clear: government does not create jobs, Americans do," said Kasich. "We do it by our creativity, risk-taking, and hard work. Therefore, the first thing that Washington must do is to get out of our way, because when government steps back, we can step forward. After all, isn't America about us?_
_ _
_" We've got to get our government out of our way, balance our budget and cut taxes. We need to take back our power and our money and get the red tape and regulators back under control. It all works together as one strategy, and if we want to see results now, we've got to fight for it."_

We'll need your ongoing support to get our message out - **please consider chipping in with a generous contribution to help:** [JohnKasich.com/Donate](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31044283:WGANlSmnN:m:1:958431888:98BD7E55F93BE104735A8F28DDE317E8:r)

**You can also sign up to volunteer in your state:** [JohnKasich.com/Volunteer](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31044284:WGANlSmnN:m:1:958431888:98BD7E55F93BE104735A8F28DDE317E8:r)

Thank you for your help!

-John

**John Weaver
**Chief Strategist
[JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31044285:WGANlSmnN:m:1:958431888:98BD7E55F93BE104735A8F28DDE317E8:r)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31044286:WGANlSmnN:m:1:958431888:98BD7E55F93BE104735A8F28DDE317E8:r)
[
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31044287:WGANlSmnN:m:1:958431888:98BD7E55F93BE104735A8F28DDE317E8:r)

name: Team Katie
subject: Red alert: Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

Senate GOP Leader Mitch McConnell just gave us one more reason to elect Katie to the U.S. Senate.

Bowing to pressure from the far right, McConnell is forming a task force to consider radical changes to the Senate rules that could effectively block any attempts by Democrats to push back against the GOP agenda. And not surprisingly, **the task force is comprised entirely of Republicans.**

**[Chip in $5 today to help send Katie to the Senate so she can stand up to Republican bullies like Mitch McConnell>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/6253302061752909824/-7696630872455249920?refcode=e20151016u&amount=15)**

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6253302061752909824/-7696630872455249920?refcode=e20151016u&amount=15)
---

While Democrats are fighting to pass commonsense solutions that grow the economy and help hardworking families get ahead, Republicans are busy playing political games.

Republicans like Mitch McConnell and his crony Pat Toomey want to change the rules because they know it's the only way they can pass their out-of-touch agenda, like finally defunding Planned Parenthood. They want to stifle any voice Democrats could have in the Senate. Changing the rules would effectively eliminate any hope of bipartisanship or progress.

That's why it's so important that Democrats take back the Senate. **We can 't afford to let Mitch McConnell and his hand-picked Republican task force eliminate our voice in the Senate.**

**[Pitch in $5 immediately to send Katie to Washington and take back Democrats' majority in the Senate!](https://act.myngp.com/el/6253302061752909824/-7696630872455249920?refcode=e20151016u&amount=15)**

Sincerely,

Team Katie

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6253302061752909824/-7696630872455249920?refcode=e20151016u&amount=15)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/6253302061752909824/-7768688466493177856).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Christian Ferry, Campaign Manager, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: About the latest fundraising numbers
body:
LindseyGraham.com

Campaign Manager Christian Ferry's update on the fundraising
numbers.

Friend -

Yesterday, we released our 3rd quarter fundraising numbers, and I
wanted to take a minute to go over with you what they mean and
what the future holds for Lindsey Graham 2016.

While the media pundits love to look at the polls and determine
who is leading the race, a much more accurate indicator of
success is money raised, money spent and current cash on hand.
And, Whitney, at this point in the election cycle the one number
that matters most is cash on hand - the amount of money we have
available to spend to continue talking to voters and making our
case.

I am happy to report to you that Lindsey Graham 2016 has more
cash on hand than Chris Christie, Mike Huckabee, Bobby Jindal,
Rick Santorum, George Pataki, and Jim Gilmore. Five candidates
have between $1 million and $6 million cash on hand, and Lindsey
Graham is right in the middle of that pack with Carly Fiorina,
John Kasich, Rand Paul, and Chris Christie. We are where we need
to be to strike when the time is right.

>From day one, we have planned for a long-term campaign. We are
spending our money wisely and not wasting a penny on anything
that won't help turn out voters for Lindsey Graham.

Unlike others, we aren't spending on huge staffs and we save
every dime we can on travel costs. We are frugal with your
contributions and run a lean campaign operation. We have capable
and experienced staff in Iowa, New Hampshire and South Carolina
and keep the overhead low. As we get closer to the first Election
Day, we continue to put money where it needs to be - into voter
contact and ground organization, not extravagant travel and
office space.

Today, Senator Graham is wrapping up a nine day tour of New
Hampshire. It has been a great trip with numerous town hall
meetings, house parties, editorial boards, media visits and even
a weekend of campaigning with John McCain.

Bottom line, Lindsey Graham 2016 is in a great spot right now and
we owe our position to you. Thank you for your past and
continued support.
I hope you have a safe and happy weekend ahead.

Christian Ferry
Campaign Manager
Lindsey Graham 2016

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: I want you to be at my birthday party
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
My birthday is around the corner: | Friend --

I'd like to get to know you, and I can't think of a better way to do that than by flying you out to New York City later this month to spend some time with a few of this campaign's best supporters and me.

**[Today, if you add your name, you'll be entered for the chance to join me -- we'll take care of the airfare and accommodations for you and a guest.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjM3NjE1NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNTk1MzY0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

This won't be a strategy meeting or anything like that. We'll have some really good food, listen to some great music, and maybe even have something unhealthy to drink, if you're up for it.

**Add your name right now for the chance to join us later this month:** | [ | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM3NjE1NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNTk1MzY0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM3NjE1NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNTk1MzY0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Hillary

**No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 10/14/15 and 10/18/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=31&ms=MjM3NjE1NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNTk1MzY0S0&mt=1&rt=0) or [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM3NjE1NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNTk1MzY0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. Two (2) winners and a guest will receive one (1) invitation to attend Hillary’s Birthday Party, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to New York and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $2,080). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjM3NjE1NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNTk1MzY0S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=30&ms=MjM3NjE1NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNTk1MzY0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM3NjE1NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNTk1MzY0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM3NjE1NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNTk1MzY0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM3NjE1NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNTk1MzY0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=MjM3NjE1NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNTk1MzY0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

clean_body: My birthday is around the corner: | Friend -- I'd like to get to know you, and I can't think of a better way to do that than by flying you out to New York City later this month to spend some time with a few of this campaign's best supporters and me. This won't be a strategy meeting or anything like that. We'll have some really good food, listen to some great music, and maybe even have something unhealthy to drink, if you're up for it. Add your name right now for the chance to join us later this month: | --- ]() Thanks, Hillary No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 10/14/15 and 10/18/15. Enter by contributing or to enter without contributing. Two (2) winners and a guest will receive one (1) invitation to attend Hillary’s Birthday Party, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to New York and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $2,080). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: Team Murphy
subject: BREAKING: McConnell threatens Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

Senator Mitch McConnell has an ultimatum for Democrats: **If you want us to pay America 's bills on time, you have to "reform" Social Security and Medicare.**

And reportedly, when McConnell says "reform," he means "reduce cost-of-living adjustments for Social Security" and "make it harder for seniors to get Medicare."

Once again, Republicans are threatening to hold the American economy hostage for extreme right-wing demands -- _and we 're not going to stand for it._ [**Today we 're making a demand of our own -- that Mitch McConnell and Republicans drop the partisan threats and do their jobs. Sign the petition here.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2176/738133e4/3a41222e/7f81ede7/629242679/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151016m")

What Senator McConnell is suggesting goes way beyond irresponsible.

When you get a bill, you can't call the company and say "I'll only pay this IF..." There is no "if." You pay the bill or face the music.

And if Republicans don't agree to pay America's bills by November 3rd, **middle-class families will face the consequences.**

[**This is a fundamental duty of Congress -- to pay our bills and keep the government running. Demand they do it. Sign the petition today.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2176/738133e4/3a41222e/7f81ede7/629242679/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151016m")

Thanks for joining us today.

Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2176/738133e4/3a41222e/7f81ede0/629242679/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: major update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

The next Republican presidential debate takes place in less than two weeks.

And just like the first two, I'm expecting the Washington Machine's gatekeepers in the press to once again double-down on their effort to stamp out my campaign and silence my message.

But Fellow Conservative, with your help, I plan to break through their wall of silence and get my message directly to voters.

My campaign is preparing to launch a massive TV and Radio Ad Blitz to flood Iowa airwaves during and after the upcoming presidential debate.

There's still air time available, but I must raise $200,000 by Tuesday, October 20th at midnight to make this work.

**[Will you please chip in $20.16 or more immediately to help make this a reality](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31054421:We7GdSm1N:m:1:879035888:1AC99C7749C2DBB07B05FDE8CB12EEAA:r)**?

Unlike many of my opponents, my campaign isn't funded by a bunch of Wall Street fat-cats and special interests who are looking for special deals, breaks and bailouts.

I'm not "their guy" and I never will be. I'm yours.

For the first time in decades, you and I have a true chance to nominate a Republican who will take a sledgehammer to the Washington Machine.

I'm running for President to deliver on my detailed plan to defeat the Washington Machine and take our country back by:

>>> Ending the IRS with my 14.5% Fair and Flat Tax that will slash taxes for all Americans as everyone pays one low rate;

>>> Repealing ALL of ObamaCare;

>>> Kicking career politicians out of office with term limits;

>>> Stopping illegal NSA spying once-and-for-all.

But I must raise $200,000 by October 20th to bust through the media's wall and get my message out directly to voters.

**[So please chip in a contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31054421:We7GdSm1N:m:1:879035888:1AC99C7749C2DBB07B05FDE8CB12EEAA:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, our liberty message is resonating all across the country.

I see it every day when I'm out meeting voters on the campaign trail.

Everywhere I go, the crowds continue to grow.

Hundreds of patriots attend each event -- and they enthusiastically respond to my plan to defeat the Washington Machine.

And when it comes to on the ground organizational strength, no other campaign out there can compete with my campaign.

In fact, I've competed against my opponents in three major presidential straw polls this year -- and I've WON all three!

There's no doubt my campaign has the organizational strength and grassroots support necessary to make me the Republican nominee!

But I must have the resources to break through the media's wall and get my message out to as many voters as possible.

**[Will you please chip in $20.16 or more immediately to help make this a reality](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31054421:We7GdSm1N:m:1:879035888:1AC99C7749C2DBB07B05FDE8CB12EEAA:r)**?

Thank you in advance for your support.

| ****[ ** dpwillis67@gmail.com ** ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31054422:We7GdSm1N:m:1:879035888:1AC99C7749C2DBB07B05FDE8CB12EEAA:r "https://secure.randpaul.com/?oct20t&sr=rhf101815a2")
**CONTRIBUTED TO IOWA AD BLITZ?**
**## NO DONATION ##** ** **
---
| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31054423:We7GdSm1N:m:1:879035888:1AC99C7749C2DBB07B05FDE8CB12EEAA:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31054424:We7GdSm1N:m:1:879035888:1AC99C7749C2DBB07B05FDE8CB12EEAA:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31054425:We7GdSm1N:m:1:879035888:1AC99C7749C2DBB07B05FDE8CB12EEAA:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31054426:We7GdSm1N:m:1:879035888:1AC99C7749C2DBB07B05FDE8CB12EEAA:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31054421:We7GdSm1N:m:1:879035888:1AC99C7749C2DBB07B05FDE8CB12EEAA:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31054421:We7GdSm1N:m:1:879035888:1AC99C7749C2DBB07B05FDE8CB12EEAA:r)

name: Jonathan Slemrod, MarcoRubio.com
subject: What do you think?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44461143:6TtDTuLkN:m:1:1349778030:62916CF1484EADCC958CD7A41CF32A6D:r)
---
| Peter, One crucial part of Marco's campaign is how much attention he puts into crafting good policy and making the case for it. Ideas are going to power the New American Century - that's why we've been rolling out new policy content on our website every day this month, and why we've been releasing comprehensive policy plans for various topics. Today, Marco is in Ohio to introduce a big one: a detailed plan for how to unleash American energy potential. He's speaking at a company in Ohio, BOC Hydraulics, that's a perfect example of how America's talent for innovation and our abundant energy resources can create high-wage blue-collar jobs in the 21st century. Getting government out of the way of energy production will lower energy prices for American consumers, but it's also helping to power a manufacturing renaissance in America. So how do we make make the most of this opportunity? Marco has laid out three goals: **Optimize America's Energy Resources** by expediting approval of energy projects, giving states more power to control production within their borders, promoting American energy exports, and more. **Minimize Government Bureaucracy** by placing caps on regulation costs, rolling back President Obama's destructive EPA regulations, and reforming environmental review processes. **Maximize Private Innovation** by making our education system, tax code, and public research projects support private-sector investment. **[You can read more about the plan here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44461144:6TtDTuLkN:m:1:1349778030:62916CF1484EADCC958CD7A41CF32A6D:r)** Good policy is a key part of how we'll make the 21st Century a New American Century. I hope you'll read up on the topics that interest you, and keep following the new ideas Marco is introducing all the time. Thanks for all your support, Jonathan SlemrodPolicy DirectorMarco Rubio for President
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Too many emails? Click [here](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive updates less often.[
Unsubscribe](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: Ben DeMarzo
subject: Opening day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Today we are opening our New Hampshire campaign headquarters! We could not have done this without the efforts of our hard working team network in The Granite State and across the entire country. Would you consider chipping in to help us with some of the upcoming costs?
> [**$50 for our door-to-door volunteers to leave literature with 100 voters**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44462157:6dzd8uLNw:m:1:1516426255:48731E36C0F982594D79CFDD6C06DC91:r)
> [**$30 for food to keep our hard-working volunteers fed**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44462158:6dzd8uLNw:m:1:1516426255:48731E36C0F982594D79CFDD6C06DC91:r)
> [**$7 for a pack of 10 hand warmers as it starts to get cold in NH**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44462159:6dzd8uLNw:m:1:1516426255:48731E36C0F982594D79CFDD6C06DC91:r)
[**Will you chip in and help us reach even more voters in New Hampshire?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44462160:6dzd8uLNw:m:1:1516426255:48731E36C0F982594D79CFDD6C06DC91:r)
Thanks for your support,
Ben
****

name: Adam Parkhomenko, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: Fwd: Join Hillary and Terry McAuliffe October 23rd:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Hillary is coming to your neighborhood! | Friend --

The organizing meeting with Hillary on Friday in Alexandria is filling up quickly, and I want to make sure you don’t miss this opportunity to see her in person!

**RSVP as soon as you can:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary-in-alexandria/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM3Njg0ODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNjcwNDc4S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Hillary can't wait to see you.

\- Adam

\----Forwarded message---
From: Adam Parkhomenko, Hillary for America
Subject: Join Hillary in Northern Virginia next Friday:

Friend --

Great news -- you have an amazing opportunity to hear from the glass-ceiling breaker herself! Hillary will be in Northern Virgina on October 23rd, and she’d love to see you in person.

Hillary’s hosting a meeting with Governor Terry McAuliffe to talk about her ideas for strengthening Virginia families and how we can get more people involved in our communities. That’s how we’ll put Hillary in the White House -- one real conversation at a time.

**[Here are the details:](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM3Njg0ODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNjcwNDc4S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

**WHAT:** Grassroots organizing meeting with
Hillary Clinton and Governor Terry McAuliffe
**WHEN:** Friday, October 23rd, 2015
11:00 a.m. - 2:00 p.m.
**WHERE:** Alexandria Market Square
301 King Street
Alexandria, Virginia 22314

**[Yes, I'll be there.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM3Njg0ODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNjcwNDc4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

[I can't make it, but I'll still volunteer! ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjM3Njg0ODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNjcwNDc4S0&mt=1&rt=0) **
Prepare to be inspired and excited about the country we’re going to build together. Securing a victory for Hillary in 2016 starts right now.

**Space is limited, so be sure to RSVP as soon as possible:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary-in-alexandria/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM3Njg0ODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNjcwNDc4S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Adam

Adam Parkhomenko
Director of Grassroots Engagement
Hillary for America

---
******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjM3Njg0ODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNjcwNDc4S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjM3Njg0ODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNjcwNDc4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM3Njg0ODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNjcwNDc4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM3Njg0ODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNjcwNDc4S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM3Njg0ODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNjcwNDc4S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM3Njg0ODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNjcwNDc4S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

Hillary will be in Northern Virgina on October 23rd, and she’d love to see you in person. Hillary’s hosting a meeting with Governor Terry McAuliffe to talk about her ideas for strengthening Virginia families and how we can get more people involved in our communities. That’s how we’ll put Hillary in the White House -- one real conversation at a time. WHAT: Grassroots organizing meeting with Hillary Clinton and Governor Terry McAuliffe WHEN: Friday, October 23rd, 2015 11:00 a.m. - 2:00 p.m. WHERE: Alexandria Market Square 301 King Street Alexandria, Virginia 22314 Prepare to be inspired and excited about the country we’re going to build together. Securing a victory for Hillary in 2016 starts right now. Space is limited, so be sure to RSVP as soon as possible: Thanks, Adam Adam Parkhomenko Director of Grassroots Engagement Hillary for America ****Did someone forward this email to you? | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Jindal?=
subject: Stand with Israel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jindal For President
body:
|
---
| | Over the past week, Israel has faced a wave of terrorist attacks from radical, violent Palestinians. The Obama Administration is unable to determine who is right and wrong between Palestinian terrorists killing innocent Israelis and the Israeli government protecting its’ citizens. Just this week, a State Department spokesman said “ _I would say certainly individuals on both sides of this divide are – have proven capable of and in our view guilty of acts of terror._ ”

That is despicable.

And unfortunately, this is just another incident in a pattern of anti-Israel behavior and rhetoric by the Obama administration.

It has to stop. The United States must have a President who will once again say clearly to the world that Israel is our friend, and we stand firmly with them.

When Hillary Clinton calls for “dialogue” as the solution to end the terrorist attacks against Israel, she implies that Israelis are responsible for terrorists attacking them. In fairness to Hillary, she probably actually believes that, but it is flat out wrong.

**Israel shouldn’t engage in “dialogue” with terrorists. Israel should destroy terrorists – and the United States should stand with Israel when it does so.**

Bobby

[](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=337d646330&e=724c64cfa7)

---
| | | Paid for by Jindal For President
